generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax errors and type mismatches.
Prioritize fixing unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure helper declarations have correct types (int, real, bool).
Use `eq` for helper definitions and `const` for constants.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on expression correction.
Do not introduce unqualified identifiers not present in the AADL model.
Do not attempt to define guarantees in implementation scope.
